reviews.review_description:
So this is sad News that Cat horror 2 got shut down but there is a new game coming up 

From vr games developer of cat horror 2

The ploblem was with the mic
I think it just needs a bit more adjustments

I feel like you should have an early access badge so people that are in playing the game early like I am and other people we should be able to get like our own little early access vent or badge or something that will stay there until it comes out of Early Access and so everybody who plays it before it comes out I'm really access get something special and we could even get our own vent possibly just like a mod event but instead for only Early Access people but then again it's just a suggestion please do not take it to heart if you don't like my idea but if you do please add it and I would love if you do I play the game all the time and I really like it and I would really like to see it upgrade and get more stuff so please update it I really like it and I'm ready for the next update!!!!

developer_response.body: the game will be out soon
